productDisplayName: Clarks Women Arizona Sands2 Gold Shoe
description: Classic  ballerinas by clarks with an innocently blunt toe cup and a perfectly cut mouth for the perfect Fit. flats need not be just a summer indulgence with their sweet, girly style - this pair also adds a party girl glam to the simple flats with its shiny synthetic leather overlay. Wear this with form fitting denims or short skirts for a house party to add instant glitz to your ensemble and be charmed out of your haughty stilettos.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a metallic finishStitch detailing around the mouth for stylePintucks on the toe boxSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with circular lugs and impact guidance line to minimize shockshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
